frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good bilateral hand coordination for gauze manipulation

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth gauze handling without tearing visible

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Extended setup phase - may impact overall time efficiency

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty
